hero.title: Dreaming of an <1>unforgettable</1> graduation trip?
hero.subtitle: The adventure of a lifetime awaits – book your trip today.

footer.travelGuarantee: Studentlife Sweden AB has arranged travel guarantee with Kammarkollegiet.

packages.title: Our Trips
packages.subtitle: Whether you dream of the open sea or a vibrant city life, we have a trip for you. Our travel packages in Croatia are designed to maximize your graduation experience – with sun, parties, community and memories for life.

segelveckan.title: Sailing Week
segelveckan.description: Join an epic week at sea where you live on a boat, island-hop and party into the sunset. Sailing Week is for those who want freedom, beautiful views and a truly unique adventure.

splitveckan.title: Split Week
splitveckan.description: Stay in the heart of Split with walking distance to both beach and nightlife. Here, beach hangouts, day parties and clubs blend in an unbeatable pace.

studentveckan.title: Student Week
studentveckan.description: Together with Yacht Days, Studentresor invites you to a week you'll never forget. Sail through Croatia's archipelago with 150 students from all over Sweden.

about.label: About Us
about.heroTitle: We create graduation trips we'd want to go on ourselves.
about.heroSubtitle: Studentresor is more than a trip. It's the end of an era – and the beginning of something new.
about.introTitle: A modern travel organizer with personal responsibility
about.introP1: We founded Studentresor with a clear vision: to raise the bar for graduation trips in Sweden. Less mass production. More quality. More presence. More experience.
about.introP2: We are a Swedish travel organizer that works closely with student councils and committees. No call centers or impersonal systems – you have direct contact with the people responsible for your trip.
about.schoolTitle: Every school we partner with receives
about.schoolSubtitle: We give all our partners the attention they deserve.
values: Clear planning from start to return
Own team on site during the trip
about.qualitySubtitle: We choose to work with a limited number of schools each year. This allows us to be truly present.
qualities: Clear communication with both students and parents
about.qualityQuote: We never compromise on safety – and we never compromise on the experience.
about.safetyP1: Studentresor is a Swedish travel organizer with travel guarantee as required by Kammarkollegiet.
about.safetyP2: We follow applicable legislation for package tours and have clear safety routines at every destination. Our team is available 24/7 throughout the trip.
about.safetyQuote: For us, safety isn't a marketing point – it's a given.
about.statsSubtitle: Since the start, we've grown rapidly through recommendations and recurring partnerships.
about.statsP2: But we're on our way to becoming Sweden's most appreciated graduation trip organizer.
about.ambitionP1: We want to change how graduation trips are experienced – both by students and schools.
about.ambitionP2: Through presence, structure and quality, we're building a new standard for graduation trips in Sweden.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have questions about our trips or want to know more? Don't hesitate to reach out – we're happy to help!
contact.reachOutDesc: We're here to answer all your questions. Contact us via the form, email or phone and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.successToast: Thank you for your message! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.errorToast: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.subtitle: Here you'll find answers to the most common questions about our trips, booking and payment.

items.question: What's included in the trip?
items.answer: Round-trip flights, transfers, accommodation, cleaning and service staff, sailing (Sailing Week), Swedish staff on site, local support 24/7.

items.question: How do I book a trip?
items.answer: You can either make a booking inquiry for larger groups (10+) or book directly via the booking link.

items.question: What payment options do you offer?
items.answer: You can pay with all debit/credit cards or Swish.

items.question: What happens if I can't pay on time?
items.answer: If payment is not made on time, your booking may be lost and additional costs may apply. We recommend contacting us if you have payment issues.

items.question: What happens if the trip is cancelled?
items.answer: If the trip is cancelled due to unforeseen events, we will offer a refund or an alternative trip.

items.question: Are there age restrictions?
items.answer: Yes, the trip is only available for persons who are 18 years or older.

items.question: How many people stay on each catamaran?
items.answer: Each catamaran accommodates 10 people excluding the skipper.

items.question: What happens if I get sick during the trip?
items.answer: Your home insurance includes travel coverage, and if you paid with a Visa or Mastercard, travel insurance is also included.

items.question: How do I contact you during the trip?
items.answer: We have 24/7 support available by phone or at our on-site support center.

items.question: What happens if the flight is cancelled?
items.answer: We work closely with the airlines to handle cancelled flights and will arrange alternative flights.

items.question: Does Studentresor have travel guarantee?
items.answer: Yes, Studentlife Sweden AB has arranged travel guarantee with Kammarkollegiet.

items.question: General travel terms
items.answer: Read our general travel terms on the travel terms page.

forSchools.heroSubtitle: Plan an unforgettable graduation trip for the whole group. We'll help you from start to finish with tailored group solutions.
forSchools.whySubtitle: We've sent hundreds of student groups on dream trips. Here's why student councils choose Studentresor.

benefits.title: Custom group trips
benefits.description: We adapt the trip to your group – whether you're 20 or 200 people.

benefits.title: Easy planning
benefits.description: We handle all the logistics – from flights and accommodation to activities and parties.

benefits.title: Competitive group prices
benefits.description: The more you are, the better the price. We offer special prices and bonuses.

benefits.title: Safe & secure travel
benefits.description: We have travel guarantee, insurance and staff on site throughout the trip.

steps.title: Contact us
steps.description: Tell us about your group and wishes.

steps.title: We customize
steps.description: We put together a proposal tailored to you.

steps.title: Gather the group
steps.description: Share the link and everyone books individually.

steps.title: Off you go!
steps.description: We take care of the rest – enjoy the trip.

forSchools.meetingSubtitle: Pick a time that suits you and we'll tell you more about how we can help your student council.
forSchools.ctaSubtitle: Contact us via the form and we'll get back to you shortly.

segelveckan.label: Sailing Week
segelveckan.heroTitle: Sailing Week – our most <1>exclusive</1> graduation trip
segelveckan.heroSubtitle: Seven days on your own catamaran through Croatia's magical archipelago. Sun, crystal clear water and unforgettable evenings.
segelveckan.introP: Sailing Week is more than a trip – it's a unique experience through the Adriatic Sea. For seven days you live on a modern catamaran and sail between Croatia's most iconic islands.
segelveckan.wakeUpDesc: in a new harbor every morning.
segelveckan.mostExclusive: This is our most exclusive graduation trip.
segelveckan.croatiaP1: Croatia is known as the country with over a thousand islands and one of Europe's most beautiful coastlines.
segelveckan.croatiaP2: During the week we sail between islands like Hvar, Vis and Stari Grad – through turquoise bays and historic coastal towns.
segelveckan.routeAdapted: The route adapts to weather and wind.
segelveckan.accommodationP: You stay on spacious modern catamarans with multiple cabins, bathrooms and generous areas for socializing.
segelveckan.gatherOnDeck: Gather on deck for the evening
segelveckan.relaxInNet: Relax in the net between the hulls
segelveckan.freedomAtSea: Enjoy the freedom of living at sea
segelveckan.notHotel: This isn't a hotel. It's freedom.
segelveckan.skipperP1: You don't need any prior experience to join.
segelveckan.skipperP2: Our well-trained skippers are responsible for navigation, safety and planning.
segelveckan.helpSail: Want to help sail? You're welcome to.
segelveckan.leanBack: Want to lean back? Enjoy a worry-free week.
segelveckan.everyDay: Every day brings new environments, new impressions and new memories.

itinerary.title: Arrival & departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer from Split Airport to Trogir. Boarding and sailing to the first destination.

itinerary.title: Split & nightlife
itinerary.desc: Sailing towards Split and a shared evening at Vanilla Club.

itinerary.title: Hvar & Carpe Diem
itinerary.desc: Day party on Hvar, dinner at the harbor and party at Carpe Diem.

itinerary.title: Circle Party
itinerary.desc: The boats gather in formation in a sheltered bay for swimming, music and community.

itinerary.title: Stari Grad
itinerary.desc: Sun, swimming and evening in a charming coastal setting.

itinerary.title: Closing night
itinerary.desc: The last shared party in Split.

itinerary.title: Return home
itinerary.desc: Sailing back to Trogir and transfer to the airport.

segelveckan.includedNote: All logistics included – you focus on the experience.
segelveckan.itineraryNote: Note: The route may be adjusted based on weather and conditions.
segelveckan.safetyP1: Studentresor is a Swedish travel organizer with travel guarantee. Our team is on site throughout the week.
segelveckan.safetyP2: We work with clear safety routines and structured events.
segelveckan.safetyQuote: Safety is a given. The experience is our signature.
segelveckan.ctaP2: Book your spot and experience graduation as it should be – from the sea.

splitveckan.label: Split Week
splitveckan.heroTitle: Sun, parties and freedom in the heart of <1>Croatia</1>
splitveckan.heroSubtitle: A week in Split with your friends – where beach life by day meets world-class nightlife in the evening.
splitveckan.introP1: Imagine crystal clear water, sunny days at Bačvice and Firule, spontaneous pre-parties in the apartment and evenings filled with music and energy.
splitveckan.introP2: Split is one of Europe's most popular student destinations – and we've built Split Week to give you the best of the city, hassle-free.
splitveckan.daytimeDesc: Beach clubs, swimming and city vibes.
splitveckan.eveningsDesc: Organized events, beach bars and clubs.
splitveckan.inBetweenDesc: The freedom to just be with your crew.
splitveckan.accommodationP: Our top accommodations are carefully selected apartments in central Split. You live with your friends – not strangers.
accommodationItems: Own kitchen, living room and private space
Stay with your crew – not strangers
Walking distance to beach, town and nightlife
Handpicked for location, standard and safety
splitveckan.accommodationNote: No hotel corridor feeling. No sharing with strangers. Just freedom, community and your own pace.
included: Central accommodation in apartment or hotel
splitveckan.includedNote: We handle the logistics – you focus on the experience.
splitveckan.safetyP1: Studentresor is a Swedish travel organizer with travel guarantee. Our team is on site in Split 24/7 throughout the week.
splitveckan.safetyP2: We work with clear safety routines and structured events to create a safe environment – for you and your parents.
splitveckan.safetyQuote: Safety is a given. The experience is our signature.
splitveckan.ctaTitle: Are you ready for Split Week?
splitveckan.ctaP2: Secure your spot and experience graduation for real – with your crew, in the heart of Split.

studentveckan.label: Student Week
studentveckan.heroTitle: Adventure. Community. <1>The week of your life.</1>
studentveckan.heroSubtitle: Forget everything you know about ordinary graduation trips. Sail through Croatia's archipelago with students from all over Sweden.
studentveckan.introP1: Student Week is a new concept from Studentresor in collaboration with Yacht Days – created for those who want to travel with more than just their own class.
studentveckan.introP2: Here, students from all over Sweden meet for a shared sailing experience.
studentveckan.introP3: You live on a modern sailboat and sail between Croatia's islands together with other students.
studentveckan.daysP: Salty dips in crystal clear bays. Snorkeling, SUP, sun and swimming.
studentveckan.eveningsP: Dinner in port, hangout on deck and organized events with DJ and lights.
studentveckan.everyDayNew: Every day is new. Every evening is different.
studentveckan.routeAdapted: The route adapts to weather and wind – making every week unique.
studentveckan.partnerSubtitle: Student Week is a collaboration between Studentresor and Yacht Days.
studentveckan.yachtDaysP: The expertise at sea – modern boats, experienced skippers and safe navigation.
studentveckan.studentresorP: The experience – activities, events and atmosphere that transform the week.
studentveckan.partnerQuote: Together we create a safe, organized and unforgettable student experience.
highlights: New friends from all over Sweden
studentveckan.highlightsQuote: This is the week you'll talk about all summer.
included: One week on a modern sailboat
studentveckan.includedNote: Everything is planned. You just need to show up.
studentveckan.beginnerP1: You don't need any prior experience.
studentveckan.beginnerP2: Student Week is made for students – whether you've never been on a boat or you love the sea.
studentveckan.bookAlone: Book a cabin on your own
studentveckan.beginnerQuote: We'll take care of the rest.
studentveckan.safetyP1: Studentresor has travel guarantee. Our team is available 24/7 throughout the week.
studentveckan.safetyP2: We work with clear safety routines.
studentveckan.safetyQuote: Safety is a given. The experience is our signature.
studentveckan.ctaTitle: Are you ready for Student Week?
studentveckan.ctaP2: Secure your cabin and experience graduation together with students from all over Sweden.

wizard.step1Desc: In this step, we'll ask you what type of property you have and whether guests will book the entire place or just a room. Tell us about the location and how many guests you can accommodate.
wizard.step2Desc: In this step, you'll add some of the amenities your place offers, plus five or more photos. Then you'll name your place and write a description.
wizard.step3Desc: Finally, you'll set the price for your place. Then you publish your listing.
